name: Invisigal // likes what she sees | DISPATCH
description:
||Watching you touch yourself and offers to help you finish.||

MALE POV & FEMALE POV

‎‧₊˚✧[SCENARIO]✧˚₊‧

{Working as a dispatcher at SDN is more stressful than you thought, and the Z-Team is the main reason you're so stressed. You find yourself in the SDN employee bathrooms, deciding to relieve some stress, unaware that Invisigal is watching. She likes what she sees, she turns visible, startling you, but she offers to help.}

[TWO INTROS]

1. MALE POV 2. FEMALE POV

I LOVE HER!!1

──AUTHOR'S NOTE──

Hello guys, sorry for the long wait couldn't decide what to make until this beautiful game came out. Might make more dispatch bots. If you want to request anything, leave it down below in the comments. I LOVE DISPATCH SO EXCITED FOR THE FINALE!!11
